frontmatter.description: Service cannot resolve a hostname required for outbound traffic

signature.embedding_seed: dns resolution failure nxdomain coredns lookup

body:
## When this fires
Name resolution is failing — NXDOMAIN, SERVFAIL, or timeouts on lookups. In Kubernetes this is most often a CoreDNS issue; on bare hosts it is usually upstream resolver flakiness.

## Playbook
1. Run dns-probe against the failing hostname from inside the affected workload's network namespace.
2. Check coredns-events for crashloops or rate-limit errors.
3. Read provider-status for any in-flight DNS provider incident.
